subcodes.first_line: We have, in numerous Tablets, enjoined upon all the friends to achieve unity and harmony, for from social intercourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع دوستان را باتحاد و اتفاق در اکثری از الواح امر نمودیم چه که از هیئت اجتماعیه
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @language and the structure of reality, @contention and conflict, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
